description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6-alpine Docker image and defines a single deploy stage job named pages. In the before_script of pages run "apk update && apk upgrade && apk add make" then "pip install -r requirements.txt". In the script step execute "make html", then "cd pdfs; make; cd ..;" and finally move the generated site with "mv _build/html public". Publish the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact and configure the job to run only on the master branch.
